### Blueprint Information

**Protocol Name:**
**Package Name:** (e.g., `aws-bnr-blueprint-polygon`)
**Maintainer:** (GitHub username or organization)
**Repository:** (URL to the source repository)
**Install Command:** (e.g., `npm install aws-bnr-blueprint-polygon` or `npm install github:org/repo`)

### Supported Networks

<!-- List the networks this blueprint supports (e.g., mainnet, testnet, devnet) -->

-

### Description

<!-- A short description (1-2 sentences) of what this blueprint deploys -->

### Checklist

- [ ] The blueprint is published and publicly accessible (NPM or public GitHub repo)
- [ ] The blueprint follows the Node Runners blueprint structure (package.json with `aws-blockchain-node-runner` field)
- [ ] The blueprint has been tested with the current Node Runners v2 release
- [ ] I understand this is a community-maintained blueprint and is NOT officially vetted by AWS
- [ ] I understand that users deploying this blueprint will go through a mandatory security review

### Additional Notes

<!-- Any other relevant information (e.g., special requirements, known limitations) -->
